title: TetherVillagers
description: TetherVillagers – a lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets you leash villagers to keep them in place. Perfect for organizing villages and farms without letting villagers wander off.
body:
![apex](https://i.imgur.com/2pvxufW.png)[APEXNODES- Лучший хостинг](https://client.apexnodes.xyz/aff.php?aff=205)

# ENG 

Allows players to leash villagers with leads!

Right-click a villager with a lead to tether or untether.

Limit how many villagers can be leashed at once (max-villagers in config).

Plays sounds and uses up leads in survival mode.

License & Credits
This project is licensed under BSD-2 clause.

For Paper/Spigot 1.20+

# RU

Позволяет привязывать жителей поводком!

ПКМ по жителю с поводком — привязать/отвязать.

Лимит привязанных жителей на игрока (max-villagers в конфиге).

Звуки и расход поводков в выживании.

Лицензия и Авторы
Этот проект имеет лицензию BSD-2-Clause.

Для Paper/Spigot 1.20+
